title: Summarize Online Review
scenario: Summarize an online review (approximately 200-300 words) into a 2-3 sentence summary. The summary should capture the main points, including the reviewer's opinion, pros, and cons. Assume the reader has no prior knowledge of the product or service. The summary should be concise and focused on the most important information.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated summary is 2-3 sentences and does not exceed 100 words.
Verify that the summary captures the reviewer's opinion, including their overall rating.
Evaluate the accuracy of the pros and cons summary, ensuring it is correct and relevant.
Assess the readability of the summary, considering factors such as grammar, spelling, and formatting.
